text.title: token-organization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for token-organization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM generates full Cartesian product of state × variant tokens (color.brand.primary.light.hover.disabled).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Symmetric token trees balloon to hundreds of tokens; cap depth and require justification per token in the prompt. Most generated tokens are never referenced.

failure-mode.description: Agent suggests component tokens that duplicate existing semantic tokens.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Duplicate component tokens double the rename surface area and confuse consumers about which to use; require an explicit justification for each component token.

failure-mode.description: Agent prunes "unused" tokens automatically via static analysis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Static analysis misses theming, runtime, per-tenant, and Storybook MDX references; auto-pruning causes silent regressions.

failure-mode.description: Agent invents a naming convention name ("Carbon style", "MUI v6 style") without grounding in the project's actual convention.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin the convention regex in every agent prompt; confidently invented convention names produce non-compliant output.
